description_long: This is a rectangular bas-relief sculpture featuring a dramatic scene in high detail. The central figures are a large bear standing on its hind legs, holding a stone or object above its head, and a reclining human figure lying on the ground beneath the bear. The background is filled with stylized trees and foliage, giving the impression of a forest setting. The lower edge of the relief contains an inscription in French, and the artist's signature is visible on the right side. The sculpture is cast in a single piece, with a flat, undecorated reverse and thin profile. The surface has a matte, stone-like finish with visible textural details.
description: A rectangular bas-relief sculpture depicting a bear looming over a reclining human in a forest scene, with detailed textures and an inscription at the base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full relief scene with the bear, human figure, forest background, and inscription clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the sculpture's thin, flat profile and the raised relief from the front.
description_view_2: The back view displays a flat, undecorated surface with subtle geometric facets and no visible details.
description_view_3: The right side view again shows the sculpture's thinness and the slight protrusion of the relief elements.
attribute_subject_matter: A bear and a human figure in a forest, based on a narrative or fable
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the object appears isolated against a neutral background.
